title: CHILD CARE RESOURCE AND REFERRAL - 211info
text: LINN BENTON COMMUNITY COLLEGE FAMILY RESOURCE AND EDUCATION CENTER CHILD CARE RESOURCE AND REFERRAL Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides training, advocacy, safety and technical assistance, consultation, and resources for child care providers. Actively recruits child care providers to register as a part of the statewide system of child care providers, and manages provider information for referrals to families in Find Child Care Oregon (FCCO). Also provides information and consulting to employers about employer-sponsored care and other child care issues. 6500 Pacific Boulevard SW Room 101 Albany, OR 97321 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-noon and 1pm-4pm Email (541) 917-4899 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 917-4899 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Varies by class DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Benton, Lincoln, and Linn Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: On North Drive on main Linn-Benton Community College campus Services: Child Care Provider Recruitment Child Care Provider Referrals Child Care Provider Training Organizational Consultation/Technical Assistance * Child Care Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: ORGANIZATIONAL DEVELOPMENT AND MANAGEMENT DELIVERY METHODS - EMPLOYER PARTNERSHIPS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LINN BENTON COMMUNITY COLLEGE FAMILY RESOURCE AND EDUCATION CENTER
